experience.description: Built EHR integration modules and worked on clinical decision support features. Spent a lot of time on FHIR interoperability issues and ehr optimization. Helped set up data governance practices for clinical workflows.

sop: I studied CS at VIT and then spent two years at a health-tech startup building EHR integration tools. That experience showed me the gap between what technology can do and what actually gets deployed in clinical settings. I want to bridge clinical workflows with technology — specifically around EHR optimization, FHIR interoperability, and clinical decision support systems. Long term I want to be a Director of Health Informatics where I can drive how hospitals adopt and use technology.
